metadata.normalization_cost: percentile (rank of medianHomeValue, higher value = worse)
metadata.normalization_life: min-max (same as scoring.ts), scaled to 0-50 via 0.5 * weighted_avg
metadata.note: Default user weights from scoring.ts (cost=5, climate=4, safety=3, healthcare=3, jobs=3, outdoors=3), renormalized without cost
